title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Salarpuria Sattva - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Salarpuria Sattva - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Salarpuria Sattva has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Salarpuria Sattva:
Salarpuria Sattva is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salarpuria Sattva!
